title: Butter (GUI) Resources
description: Gives some of Minecraft GUI a more cartonny look!
body: Have you ever thought that Minecraft effects and the hunger bar, health bar, and defense bar looked a bit... lacking? Well, then this pack is just right for you! It gives every potion effect a cartoonish look, and makes the other bars in Minecraft look more cartoony too! Oh, and I guess there is a custom font too. (This will be part of a larger pack in the future Check it out on PMC!
